title: Domain-Specific Computational, Functional and Structural Methods Enable Interpretation ofBRCT Variants of Uncertain Significance.
snippet: Pathogenic germlineandvariants cause most hereditary breast and ovarian cancers. Widespread genetic testing has revealed thousands of variants with unknown effects on disease risk, known as variants of uncertain significance (VUS).VUS, the majority of which are missense, complicate genetic test interpretation and clinical decision-making.
